text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
236 
RX_ORGN_CD 
LABEL: 
Prescription Origin Code 
DESCRIPTION: How the prescription was sent to the pharmacy. 
SHORT NAME: RX_ORGN_CD 
LONG NAME: RX_ORGN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 
FILE(S): 
RX header 
VALUES: 
0 = Not Known 
1 = Written — prescription obtained via paper 
2 = Telephone — prescription obtained via oral instructions
